recommendations.title: Ayla: The Daughter of War
recommendations.overview: In 1950, amidst the ravages of the Korean War, Sergeant Süleyman stumbles upon a a half-frozen little girl, with no parents and no help in sight and he risks his own life to save her, smuggling her into his army base and out of harm’s way.

recommendations.title: Sweet & Sour
recommendations.overview: Faced with real-world opportunities and challenges, a couple endures the highs and lows of trying to make a long-distance relationship survive.

recommendations.title: Special Delivery
recommendations.overview: A black-market cabbie drives criminals at breakneck speeds until she is left in charge of a fugitive's son.

recommendations.title: War of the Arrows
recommendations.overview: After the death of their father, two siblings are raised by their father's best friend. However, when one gets kidnapped just before her wedding, the other rises against the Manchus.

recommendations.title: The Admiral: Roaring Currents
recommendations.overview: Admiral Yi Sun-sin faces a tough challenge when he is forced to defend his nation with just 13 battleships against 300 Japanese enemy ships in the Battle of Myeongryang.

recommendations.title: Recalled
recommendations.overview: Soo-jin, who lost her memories due to a horrible incident, starts suspecting her husband. She is confused between reality and illusion, truth and lies.

recommendations.title: The Attorney
recommendations.overview: Song Woo-seok is a lawyer with no clients. When his friend's son is falsely accused of a crime and tortured, he takes up the case and the course of his life changes for good.

recommendations.title: A Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journali

recommendations.title: The Witness
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man witnesses a cruel murder and becomes entangled in circumstances out of his control.

recommendations.title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
recommendations.overview: A story about a mentally ill man wrongfully imprisoned for murder and his relationship with his 6 year old daughter.
